title: Language Whitelist
description: Filters the Language menu so it only shows the languages you choose.
body:
![Mod showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d787f77bdf9a84341904dcb9033068a73054be1e_0.webp)
**Language Whitelist** is a lightweight client-side mod that cleans up Minecraft’s Language menu. It hides all other entries and keeps only the languages you whitelist in the config. Great if you regularly switch between just a couple of languages, or if you simply want a tidy, minimal language list.


> **Features:**
- Client-side only (no server install required).
- Filters the Language menu using a simple whitelist.
- If the config list is empty, the mod does nothing and shows all languages.
- Includes a safety fallback so the list can’t accidentally become empty.


> **Configuration:**
- Edit the client config file and add language codes exactly as Minecraft uses them (e.g. **en_us**, **ru_ru**, **pt_br**).
- You can also use * or **all** to show every language.
![Example mod configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d0647629449e58581508fdd5e31aeb524a7553b_0.webp)
